query:
SELECT ticker, date, close 
FROM historicalPrices 
WHERE ticker IN ('NOVN.SW', 'NESN.SW', 'SLHN.SW', 'MONC.MI', 'EOSE', 'TSM', 'ADEN.SW', 'AAPL.US', 'VGK.US', 'XLE.US', 'VWO.US', 'SCMN.SW', 'NVDA.US')
AND date = '2025-11-27'
ORDER BY ticker
command:
